This wish guarantee count is independent of the guarantee counts of other types of wishes. ※ The "Test Run" trial event will be open during this event wish. Travelers may use fixed lineups containing the selected trial characters to enter specific stages and test them out. Travelers that complete the challenges will receive the corresponding rewards! ※ For more information, go to the Wish screen and select Details in the bottom-left corner. The brand-new Of Lush Forests and Flying Sand Impression Apparel Series brings a variety of outfits and bags themed around Alhaitham, Kaveh, Tighnari, and Cyno.
